_meta.description: Pinned per-tenant trust roots for the bipcircle-verifier. Each tenant entry binds the verifier to a specific bank-service URL, XRPL issuer account (for the daily attestation tx), KMS public key (by kid pattern), and one or more tokens (per chain). Eliminates the user-supplied-URL trust gap (Pro audit F1+F2). Updates happen via verifier source releases: a tenant onboards or extends to a new chain, the operator opens a PR to this file, a new verifier version cuts, npm publish, verifiers in the field upgrade when the new tenant comes online.
_meta.schemaNotes: v2 introduces tokens[] (array) so a single tenant can hold stablecoin products on multiple chains. v1 used `token` (object); v1 entries still read by the registry loader (back-compat), but new entries should use `tokens[]`.
